case_title: ICE MACHINES, INC. VS NEWELL'S BAR & RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ICE MACHINES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NEWELL'S BAR & RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWELL'S BAR & RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. $818.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $853.00, DEFT'S CHALLENGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. DEFT'S NAME IS AMENDED TO: NEWELL'S BAR & RESTURANT SUPPLY INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
